templates.title: Thought Record
templates.description: Capture automatic thoughts and build balanced alternatives.

steps.title: Situation
steps.prompt: Describe the situation that triggered this thought.

steps.title: Automatic Thought
steps.prompt: What was the first thought that appeared?

steps.title: Belief Strength
steps.prompt: How strongly did you believe this thought?

steps.title: Balanced Thought
steps.prompt: Write a more balanced thought.

templates.title: Behavioral Activation
templates.description: Plan and track meaningful actions to improve mood.

steps.title: Activity
steps.prompt: What activity will you do today?

steps.title: Effort Estimate
steps.prompt: How difficult does this feel right now?

steps.title: Category
steps.prompt: Select the activity category.

steps.title: Schedule
steps.prompt: When will you do it?

templates.title: Worry Postponement
templates.description: Contain worry loops by scheduling a dedicated worry window.

steps.title: Worry Topic
steps.prompt: What is your main worry right now?

steps.title: Urgency
steps.prompt: How urgent does this worry feel?

steps.title: Control Level
steps.prompt: How much control do you have over this today?

steps.title: Worry Window
steps.prompt: Set a specific time to revisit this worry.

templates.title: Socratic Questioning
templates.description: Challenge unhelpful beliefs with structured reflective questions.

steps.title: Core Belief
steps.prompt: What belief are you examining?

steps.title: Evidence For
steps.prompt: What evidence supports this belief?

steps.title: Evidence Against
steps.prompt: What evidence does not support this belief?

steps.title: Certainty
steps.prompt: How certain are you now?

templates.title: Exposure Hierarchy
templates.description: Break feared situations into gradual, manageable exposure steps.

steps.title: Target Fear
steps.prompt: What fear are you working on?

steps.title: Current Distress
steps.prompt: How distressing is this right now?

steps.title: Exposure Level
steps.prompt: Pick a starting challenge level.

steps.title: First Step
steps.prompt: Describe your first exposure step.
